I will continue fighting to ensure the technology of tomorrow is developed right here in the Mohawk Valley." — Senator Schumer PsiQuantum is the global leader in photonic quantum computing, and in February announced Omega, a quantum photonic chipset purpose-built for utility-scale quantum computing. Featured in a newly published paper in[ _Nature_](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-025-08820-7), the chipset contains all the advanced components required to build million-qubit-scale quantum computers and deliver on the profoundly world-changing promise of the technology _._ The Omega chipset is made in a high-volume semiconductor fab – GlobalFoundries' Fab 8 in New York – the highest level of technical maturity and scale in a field that is often confined to research labs and small-scale prototypes. Press release Welinq and Quandela Partnership

This collaboration combines Quandela's expertise in photonic quantum computing with Welinq's pioneering full-stack quantum interconnects technology, to provide custom quantum links for photonic quantum computers, setting new industry standards and paving the way for clusters of interconnected and error-corrected photonic quantum computers.
Quandela the European leader in photonic quantum computing, and Welinq, a leading quantum networking company, proudly announce a transformative partnership for the quantum industry.

occurrences.interaction_phrase: combining Quandela's expertise in photonic quantum computing with Welinq's pioneering full-stack quantum
occurrences.occurrence_sentence: This collaboration combines Quandela's expertise in photonic quantum computing with Welinq's pioneering full-stack quantum interconnects technology, to provide custom quantum links for photonic quantum computers, setting new industry standards and paving the way for clusters of interconnected and error-corrected photonic quantum computers.

This partnership is in line with Quandela and Welinq's desire to work together to develop fully-fledged clusters of photonic quantum computers, which would have both hardware and algorithmic advantages over alternative approaches.

occurrences.interaction_phrase: the committees within the governing body of QuantumBW — the Executive Board
occurrences.occurrence_sentence: Guided by the framework of these four fields of action for the promotion of quantum technologies in Baden-Württemberg and the targets formulated in the technology roadmaps, the committees within the governing body of QuantumBW — the Executive Board, supported by the Advisory Board and the Office — will prioritize and shape concrete implementation steps and measures in a timely manner.

The Quantum Technology Alliance Baden-Würt-temberg, QuantumBW for short, is an initiative that has been set up to promote quantum technology in THE LÄND — Germany's federal state of Baden-Würt-temberg.

QuiX Quantum is pleased to announce its membership in QuantumBW and Photonics BW, two leading Baden-Württemberg networks driving collaboration across quantum technologies, photonics, research, industry and technology transfer.
QuiX Quantum joins QuantumBW and Photonics BW, two leading Baden-Württemberg networks driving collaboration across quantum technologies, photonics, research, industry and technology transfer.

Through its membership in QuantumBW and Photonics BW, QuiX Quantum aims to contribute its expertise in photonic quantum computing, integrated photonics, system architecture and deep-tech commercialization.

"Strong ecosystems are essential to bring quantum technologies from research into industrial application. QuantumBW and Photonics BW connect the right capabilities across science, industry and technology transfer. We are proud to become part of these networks and look forward to contributing to an even stronger photonic and quantum ecosystem in Baden-Württemberg, the Netherlands and across Europe," said Robin Wittland, Chief Commercial Officer at QuiX Quantum.
